chat_messages.text: what do you think about these reviews?

attachments.extracted_content:
index,author,rating,text
0,Jackie Kido,1 star,"Horrendous customer support
I lost my mom and had to rely on uhaul to help me with the move with all my moms belongings. After my move, everything was conpleted so I thought. I even had the $0.00 balance receipt showing $0.00
Then I was contacted by rude reps saying I owed for tolls, which was an ABSURD LIE, since I used my own transponder and was charged for the tolls(which were charged to my account). I repeatedly contacted customer support with the proof of payment from my toll transponder bill, clearly showing the tolls were paid in full. Yet they continue to harass me stating that I owe them, when in fact, I DO NOT. Total negligence on their part.
I cannot believe the absolute Disrepect, lack of customer service, no courtesy, rudeness , incorrigible attitude and belligerence of the uhaul representatives joel nunez, jocelyn gonzales and tyrynn dennis & generic uhaul email
I have never been treated so poorly, with the worst customer service Ive ever had to be subjected to..especially after losing my mom. I mean is this what you call customer care?  More like tyrants and appalling lack of support and carelessness of rude and incompetent representatives.
Its unbelievable that they treat customers like this after we give them our business.
If you are ever in need DONT USE THEIR SERVICE!! Save yourself the grief and wrongful billing practices they will harass you with!!!
I tried repeatedly to contact them to work this out, but unfortunately they think their needs are above the customer
They will NEVER  earn my business ever again and I will be sure to warn all others of their INCOMPETENCE, selfish attitude and lazy responses of uselessness and overall HORRIBLE customer care.
The worst that Ive ever experienced in my life. Stay away from them
#uhaulFAIL #uhaulDISAPPOINTMENT
#uhaulNEVERAGAIN"
1,Andrew Matschiner,1 star,"My U-Pod was involved in an accident in Arizona in early August. I heard briefly from U-Haul 10 days after the accident and have not heard from them since. For a month now, my U-Pod has sat at a towing facility. U-Haul has yet to retrieve the pod, much less deliver it. The towing company confirms that payment for towing is all that is needed for retrieval of the pod, yet the pod continues to sit in the tow yard while I am without a mattress, bedframe, couch, cooking supplies, clothes, and more.

Please pick up my pod and deliver it."
2,Karen Simonetti,1 star,"Do not rent from them. They have got a ring of thug movers that work with them to steal trucks and in return you get hundreds of thousands charged to your credit card. A complete scam! Rented a Uhaul to move my disabled daughter within a mile radius. Paid in full $125. The mover I used to help me.. stole the truck and filled it up with debris and returned to a different location. They charged my credit card $539 on top of the $125 I had already paid. This moving guy had done this to others and feel like they are working with him because they know him. They told me I should not have called police on him. They refused to remove the $539 charge even though I bought the Safe Move Plus Insurance which says it covers theft. This has put my family in severe financial debt. These are some horrible people  that work for this company and will never use again! If you do rent from them..do not ever give them a credit card. Pay a cash deposit. Their trucks are also very ragged and all have about 150,000 miles on them."
3,Dean Somers,5 stars,"Carissa, Michelle, Adrienne and the entire team at the U-Haul Central Office and Roadside Assistance Program were very professional, knowledgeable, and, and courteous in helping me to resolve my issue with my vehicle being stuck on the tow dolly.  Michelle came up with innovative solutions to resolve my issue and was very prompt to and thorough in getting me in touch with Roadside Assistance.  Adrienne and Carissa were extremely helpful and took the time to gather all of the information and to follow up to ensure the Tow Truck Company arrived on time and completed all the work to complete satisfaction.
The gentleman, Gabriel at Gator Towing was excellent.  He quickly and expertly assessed my situation and provided a solution that not only removed my vehicle from the tow dolly but did it safely without any damage to my vehicle.  The entire experience from start to finish was exceptional and made the customer feel like the they were listened to and satisfied with all the work completed to the end.  All should be recognized and commended."
4,Hate Nine,1 star,"Reference Reservation # 92982498.
When a customer logs into their account & creates a truck & towing reservation for truck & trailer it’s obvious that the customer would want to pick both up at the same address. You charge by mileage & I have to drive your equipment to another location to pick up the trailer. That’s assuming they have one or that they answer the phone. I’m under time constraints to exit my residence or pay another month’s rent & rather than being able to be there to pick the equipment up at 7:30 I get to watch the clock so I can call at 7:00 AM. I also enjoyed the fact that I was to be called by 7:00 PM to confirm my reservation & @ 7:02 PM my phone rings a couple of times & then nothing. No message. I immediately call back & they’re closed.   Your 24/7 help desk were able to tell me the problem but yes I must call in the morning to resolve. I’m the customer. How about the location that should have had my equipment call me as soon as they open & then every half hour afterwards until they reach me?  This is a U-Haul problem that you’ve now made mine. Since you’ve impeded my plans & inconvenienced me how about you extend discounting to my booking?!  Hopefully someone can tell me where the truck is & then where I must go to pick up the trailer. I’m not paying the added mileage between locations nor the difference from the further location back to my house to begin packing at least 90 minutes later than planned. I’m looking forward to speaking with someone at 7:00 AM to hear how a truck or trailer showing available to rent go MIA & it takes U-Haul 2 1/2 hours to figure it out before waiting to call me at the moment they close.  If my employees had done this it would be a write up. I would give you a rating of zero if it were allowed.
10/10 Do NOT recommend!"
5,Dr. Neda Nafei,1 star,I made a reservation a month in advance for a 20feet truck from Pleasanton to San Jose at the Bernal location U-Haul. I was supposed to return the truck to San Jose instead of driving it back to Pleasanton which is 30 miles away. The reservation went  through and confirmation email came and said you will receive a call the day before. And I did receive the call just 24 hours before my big move telling me they don't have a 20' truck to be delivered in San Jose. The extremely rude lady on the phone told me to either rent a much larger truck that I can not drive anyways and pay more or the 20' needs to be returned to the original place of rent and pay for 30 miles more in mileage. The person talking to me had the attitude of take it or leave it. If I had advance notice I would have found another company. They cornered me with 24 hours left before my move and not even with an apology or waiving the cost of extra mileage that they sprang on me last minute. So disappointed and upset with the way the representative spoke to me and the behavior of the company.
6,Jeanette White,1 star,"First of all, there isn't even an office at that location. It's a pub. When we arrived the place was closed. I called U-Haul number and a guy said he would send someone downstairs to look after us. Ten minutes later a guy came down. He didn't seem to know what we were there for. Finally we made our way to the back parking lot of the pub and there was 1 U-Haul. The guy asked for my son-in-law's license since he was the one who would be driving it. My son-in-law has a perfect driving license and he's 58 yrs old. The guy took a picture of his license and was typing something for about 10 minutes, then he asked for the driver's license again. Again he took a picture of both front and back of his license. He didn't offer us any explanation why it was taking so long, even though we asked him. finally he said he was having trouble with the system. He had a thick East Indian accent and was very hard to understand. Then he asked for another license from my daughter who was waiting in our car. I quickly said, take mine. He took a picture of mine, both front and back. We were getting a bit anxious because we had a superintendent holding the elevator for us and we were by that time, 35 minutes late. Finally the guy decided to call someone but he said they were answering. Finally my daughter got fed up and called U-Haul on her phone and got through. We got that settled, then the guy said that the contract had to be changed because I was the one who reserved the truck and it was in my name, not my son-in-law's.Finally after 40minutes, he gave us the key. When my son-in-law got in the truck, the gas gauge was almost on empty. Yet we were told to return the truck with the same amount of gas in it.   WE WEREN'T IMPRESSED AT ALL. I would NEVER recommend this U-Haul to my worst enemy."
7,Brian Fenton,1 star,"It's been (5) months now since we cleared out our U-Box right in the Panorama City lot. Walked in to the warehouse office and asked if there was anything we have to fill out before we left. ""Nope, have a nice day."" We've been charged every month since for storage. Been told 5 separate times over the phone with corporate that the manager would call to rectify their continued stealing from us but nothing still end of July (mid August now). Credit card company has refused to refund more than the first 3 months stating we need proof: NO, U-HAUL NEEDS TO PROVIDE PROOF OUR STUFF IS THERE. Notifying the Better Business Bureau to keep away from this very poorly operated company. Will not be doing business ever again with these money stealing and lying stains."

8,G M,1 star,This will be the last time using your service. I put my reservation in two weeks ahead. Was routed to one location the entirety of the time up to the night before and 8:30 this morning I was notified by email  not phone call that my 12:00 reservation was changed to well out of my area and because I didn’t see your email and was 20 minutes late my reservation was cancelled by your company. Leaving me in a bind and spend excess funds on another truck. Thanks for your great service to customers!
9,Jordan Cressel,1 star,"Despite the fact that you rented me a vehicle unable to complete the full trip, had already agreed the final charge would be adjusted because it needed to be towed, you all proceeded to charge me an erroneous amount on the day I needed to buy food and my account is now overdrawn. And you have the nerve to tell me there's nothing you can do because of a ""Call to Action"" policy that requires 72 business hours to resolve?

Why are you punishing me for your mistake? Your business is full of incompetent people who cannot abide by their word, can't understand accountability, and cannot maintain working vehicles so that customers like me aren't driving 10mph on the freeway due to a transmission failure that you would have probably caught if you did the bare minimum quality checking.

I hate you"
10,Paul,1 star,"No way to get ahold of any management. Seriously, if you have any issue try and ask anyone at the call center or at a local U-haul and you will not be able to get ahold of anyone in management. Really does tell you what U-haul management thinks of their customers.

We had ordered 2 U-boxes to be delivered and there was a system error on U-Hauls end and they said our U-Boxes could not be released to us until we paid the remaining balance of someone that was tied to our account erroneously. This was the U-haul error. They tied someone to our account that we do not know.

When we called the E-Alert team with U-haul, we had the most unprofessional customer service rep I have ever encountered. Her name was Tiara. She provided ZERO help and lacked any empathy to the situation at all. She just said that WE have to reach out to the person that U-haul incorrectly tied to our account and ask them to pay the unpaid balance... Yes, you read that correctly... Tiara told US to contact a person we have no idea who they are to get them to pay their bill to U-Haul... I repeatedly said that we do not know who this person is. We asked for contact information and Taira said that she cannot give that to us... You get the situation this put us in. Extremely frustrating. All while we have moving help sitting at the local U-haul waiting for the U-boxes to be released.

We called the local U-haul and were trying to work with them. We also called the Corporate customer service line and they said that we have to work through the ""E-Alert"" team. So we called them back again (While having to wait 30-40 minutes at a time). We had someone else on the E-Alert team helping us this time and explained the situation again... This customer service rep actually helped us! They told us how an error like this could happen and removed the person that as incorrectly placed on our account. THE WHOLE time Tiara could have done this, but choose not to because she is awful at her job and should not be in customer service at all.

Overall, it took 5 hours of phone calls with multiple different U-haul people to fix the error that they made to release out household items from being held hostage. There are some significant system flaws within U-haul that need to be fixed so these types of situations do not happen again.

Also, each person that we spoke to, when we asked to speak with management, said that is not possible and that they are not allowed to escalate any issues and are not allowed to forward anything to management is insane.

Needless to say, we will never be doing business with U-haul again. This whole transaction was a complete nightmare and I hope people think twice about using U-Haul."
11,2079depot,1 star,"Registered with the app the day before to pick up at 7:30 AM. The app did not work. The office did not open till nine. The Uhaul location on Shepard Ave. Houston was an absolute mess, it looked like a junkyard. The truck was old and dirty, and the dolly that I pre-ordered was not in the truck. I had to contact customer service and it took an hour and 20 minutes to finally get the key. Before I returned the truck, I added the exact same gas that was used (have pics) and was still charged a fuel fee and for a dolly also an additional 50 miles. I was told by C.Service that I would be contacted by area manager. It’s been three days and I’m still waiting for a call back. If Uhaul company wants to continue a successful company, they need to pay more attention to the franchises that are representing them. I will close my account with Uhaul after over 10 years very disappointing. I Will follow up to see if Uhaul cares about their customers."
12,Susan Elliott,1 star,Uhaul waited 2 months to contact me about the mileage.  The first contact was from their collections department.  Threatening me with a lawsuit or a collections company.  I never got a bill for the mileage.  Now they are trying to pull the money from my bank directly.  I still don't have a bill.  I contacted them 8 days ago and filed a complaint.  They said I would get an email from them.  Never got that either.  I will never use them again and ask my friends and family not to use them either.
13,Michael Reign,1 star,Rented a small trailer for 3 days to move a few items from Washington State to Nevada. Trailer broke down and we spent 7 hours before someone showed to tell us it was broken. Horrible experience on the side of the highway in 103 degree weather broke down for 7 hours. This company is the absolute worst.
14,Lisa Alexander,1 star,Do not rent from any Uhaul nationwide until they make sure no one can steal your rental. It's a nationwide problem and they don't care if it's stolen then you have to fight like hell to get your money back. You are paying hard earned money to rent a truck and drive it safely to your destination and with a full tank of gas but if the truck gets stolen your screwed and no one cares.
15,Sarah Balderamos,1 star,"The manager Louis at the South LA location on 110 & Vermont lied to us saying it’s 15 minute policy to get your truck he was upset because we said we going to call corporate about him pulling his people out of the line while people were waiting for at least 45 minutes. I said I was going call corporate and he retaliated by lying to us about our reservations being canceled and sent us across town costing us more money and time. When we got across town we found out that there is no 15 minutes policy and the Location on 110th and Vermont where Louis works called us and said our truck was ready so he’s lying to people to use his little Feel that he has as a manager he’s a terrible person and this is a terrible business and I would not recommend this to people who are trying Take care of business by moving their families or businesses I will also make an appoint to tell as many people as possible, not to use U-HAUL to use another moving service. I work for a large corporation and I will make sure that I will pass the word in this corporation not to use U-HAUL rent a truck a van or family member or anything other than U-HAUL as a result of this bad managers behavior. U-HAUL will lose money because I’m going to take this and post this on all social media post not to use U-HAUL"
16,Justyn Duke,5 stars,"I recently had the pleasure of speaking with Mini Genet at U-Haul Corporate, and I am compelled to share my exceptional experience. Over a year ago, I rented a vehicle from U-Haul that, unbeknownst to me, had a hole in the roof. After loading the truck with all my valuables, a heavy rainstorm destroyed many of my belongings. When I returned the vehicle, I informed the store manager, Jaclyn Olivo, about the damage, hoping she would simply waive the rental fee. Instead, I was unjustly blamed for the damage and harassed for a year about paying over $1,500 for repairs.

My interactions with U-Haul’s insurance company (Rep West Insurance) were also frustrating, as an extremely rude representative dismissed my claim by reviewing images and stating she saw no prior damage to my rental. However, Mini at Corporate changed everything. She demonstrated an extraordinary level of professionalism and empathy by thoroughly examining the images, zooming in, and discovering the light reflection from the hole in the roof that had been previously overlooked.

Mini didn't just stop there. She went above and beyond by helping me complete a complaint form, ensuring that my issue was properly documented and addressed. Her dedication and willingness to listen made all the difference in resolving this stressful situation. Mini's outstanding customer service and genuine care for my predicament restored my faith in U-Haul. I am incredibly grateful for her assistance and highly commend her for her exceptional work."
17,mary krizanich,1 star,"Worst experience ever! Rented a truck going 2000 miles they gave me a truck w prior engine problems you think they would give you a better truck going that far. Even the mechanic was concerned about us making it the rest of the way 800 more miles I've called several times Edwin was rude so I asked for his manager David to call, I've called 4 times now and its a month later, no one gets back to me. All they want to do is pay for my hotel stay that night we broke down. NO CUSTOMER SERVICE!"
